[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00001000 1
3 00000000 a
4 01010100 3
5 01001100 3
6 01000110 3
7 01010001 3

01 10 00001000 1 match 2
12 21 00000000 a match 0 1 3
23 32 01010100 3 match 4
34 43 01001100 3 match 5
45 54 01000110 3 match 6
56 65 01010001 3 match 7
67 76 11000000 2
70 07 10000010 2

02 20 00010000 1
13 31 00001000 1 match 2
24 42 01000100 2
35 53 01010100 3 match 4
46 64 01001000 2
57 75 01000010 2
60 06 10011000 3
71 17 00000000 a match 0 1 3

03 30 10011000 3
14 41 00001000 1 match 2
25 52 01010100 3 match 4
36 63 11011000 4
47 74 01000010 2
50 05 00010010 2
61 16 00001000 1 match 2
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 00001010 2
15 51 00000000 a match 0 1 3
26 62 01010000 2
37 73 11000000 2
[completion]
0 12 21 71 17 15 51
1 12 21 71 17 15 51
2 01 10 13 31 14 41 61 16
